examples: Pain around and sometimes behind the kneecap.
Roll the leg inward until the kneecap faces the other leg.
Don't push your knee itself back, even though you are drawing your kneecap inward.
He was taken to hospital where it was revealed his kneecap had split in two.
Mr. KIEFER SUTHERLAND (Actor): (As Jack Bauer) I shot her above the kneecap.
